sections.paragraph:
verb נמס

to melt, dissolve, thaw; be weakened, reconciled

verb למסות

to cause to melt, dissolve, thaw

verb למסות

to weaken

verb להמס

to cause to melt, dissolve, thaw; weaken, discourage

verb להמיס

to cause to melt, dissolve, thaw; weaken, discourage

verb הומס

be melted, dissolved, thawed

masculine noun

tax, impost, toll, rate, tribute; levy, duty, imposition, scot, seigniorage, seignorage
